pageContext.name: Raziel: Scholar of the Infinite
pageContext.description: Sideshow Art Prints presents the Raziel: Scholar of the Infinite Fine Art Print, an original fantasy art design by artist Peter Mohrbacher. Part of his original Angelarium series, this contemplative portrait shines a light on the studious Seraphim devoted to the unknown.  From the mind of Peter Mohrbacher, the Angelarium project has grown into an artistic anthology of designs inspired by numerous named angels throughout mythology. The Seraphim are divine manifestations of mortal beliefs, and Raziel is the Angel of Mysteries who ponders the incomprehensible nature of existence. This knight of knowledge sits with paper wings unfurled as they study a truly unending subject, humbled in the pursuit of understanding.  This erudite illustration is now being offered to fans in a high-end, museum quality print format for the first time in collaboration with Sideshow Art Prints. Each Raziel: Scholar of the Infinite Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Angelarium series logo as a part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée and in a custom framed presentation, this angelic fantasy wall art makes a truly unique addition to any collection, especially alongside other Angelarium art prints.  Unlock the elusive mysteries of eternity and bring home the Raziel: Scholar of the Infinite Fine Art Print by Peter Mohrbacher for your collection today.
